title: CallsPopover component for displaying module call information
purpose: Displays a fixed-positioned popover card with module information including file stem, title, purpose, and exported functions when a module is called.
module_context: Exports a default React component named CallsPopover that accepts props for file data, positioning, visibility, and navigation callbacks.

steps.content: Extract all relevant props from the input object.
Compute the fixed position for the popover using either provided position or anchor rectangle.
IF the visible flag is explicitly false, return null to hide the popover.
Extract exported functions from the file data using memoization for performance.
Build the popover content JSX with file stem, title, purpose, and exported functions.
Render the popover content inside a React portal attached to the document body.
IF a fixed position is provided, use it directly.
ELSE IF an anchor rectangle is provided, calculate position below and aligned with the rectangle.
Filter the methods from file data to include only those marked as exported.
Return empty array if no methods exist in file data.
